name: Chip Englander
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 7/25
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For President
body:
( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645492-d12ee94f3d-aa67ee2f91 )

Saturday, July 25, 2015

Senator Paul promoted his plan to "kill the tax code" this week
with a must-see video ( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645497-897b398440-aa67ee2f91 ). In it, he destroys
all 70,000 pages of the federal tax code with a chainsaw, a
woodchipper, and even fire. Supporters were also encouraged to
vote for how they would kill the tax code. The chainsaw won
handily with 67 percent of the vote.

In Washington, Senator Paul introduced an amendment to defund
Planned Parenthood, as well as legislation to allow armed service
members to carry firearms for self-defense on military
installations. Stay tuned for the next edition of the Rand Paul
for President Weekly Newsletter.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President

----------------
News of the Week
----------------

Senator Rand Paul Destroys the U.S. Tax Code
--------------------------------------------

Sen. Rand Paul unveiled his plan for destroying the 70,000-page
U.S. Tax Code. His 'Fair and Flat' Tax Plan will be the largest
tax cut in American history and will leave roughly $2 trillion in
the pockets of hardworking Americans over a 10-year period.

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645498-858f41c185-aa67ee2f91 )

JC Watts to Campaign for Rand Paul in Iowa
------------------------------------------

Former Congressman JC Watts traveled to Iowa on Friday to
campaign on behalf of Rand Paul for President. "Senator Paul has
shown what I have always believed, a leader can be a strong
economic and social conservative and yet be concerned about the
least of these," Watts said.

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645499-046f257f8f-aa67ee2f91 )

Rand Paul Pushes to Defund Planned Parenthood After Alarming
Videos
-----------------------------------------------------------------

Recent video revelations, involving potentially criminal
activity, make it more obvious than ever that this organization
has absolutely zero respect for the sanctity of human life and is
an affront to the most basic human dignity enshrined in our
founding documents," Senator Paul said.

--------------
Featured Video
--------------

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645497-897b398440-aa67ee2f91 )

"How Would You Kill the Tax Code?"
----------------------------------

Watch Senator Paul kill the federal tax code with a chainsaw, a
woodchipper, and fire!

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645497-897b398440-aa67ee2f91 )

--------------------
Photos from the Week
--------------------

---------------
Featured Events
---------------

Event Image ( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645500-753cb1f2f0-aa67ee2f91 )

Stand with Rand in Iowa!
------------------------

Join Senator Rand Paul for a meet and greet in Waterloo,
Williamsburg, Washington, Tipton, or Davenport on July 31st.

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645500-753cb1f2f0-aa67ee2f91 )

�

�

�

�

---------------------
Volunteer of the Week
---------------------

�

Doug Bricker
------------

Jefferson County, Iowa
----------------------

Doug made around 1,200 phone calls in about a week for Rand's
Iowa City announcement, and even walked 6 hours straight wearing
a sandwich board. He says that the secret to calling and door
knocking is to set a goal -- and stick with it!

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645501-40b35d6353-aa67ee2f91 )

Event Image

�

�

----------------------
Featured Store Product
----------------------

Autographed Copy of Taking a Stand
----------------------------------

$250.00
-------

Rand's new book, autographed! More autographed items are
available in the store.

�

�

-----------------
Quote of the Week
-----------------

�

Post this to your Instagram
---------------------------

On your phone, tap and hold, click Save Image, then post to your
Instagram with hashtag #StandwithRand

�

�

-----------------
Tweet of the Week
-----------------

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645502-8ae0eadbe2-aa67ee2f91 )

�

Retweet ( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645502-8ae0eadbe2-aa67ee2f91 ) and follow @RandPaul ( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645503-8255ad8113-aa67ee2f91 ) on
Twitter!

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645502-8ae0eadbe2-aa67ee2f91 )

�

�

�

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645504-dc585642ac-aa67ee2f91 )

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645505-986f5268ad-aa67ee2f91 )

�

Rand Paul for President ( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645492-d12ee94f3d-aa67ee2f91 )

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645506-3d451f4e5c-aa67ee2f91 )

( http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79986-171839-1645507-d7c8d557bd-aa67ee2f91 )

-->

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Meet The Press just released a New Hampshire poll this morning that shows major momentum for Gov. John Kasich. John has leapfrogged many of the GOP candidates and now sits at #4.

Our national support has also doubled. [This is major momentum and we need your support right now to keep it going](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29322311:28121585233:m:1:958431888:D15B77D202F776682DD8F535423DD8B6:r).

Peter, Gov. Kasich just visited New Hampshire, South Carolina, Iowa and Michigan to share his vision for a stronger America. And people are responding.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29322311:28121585233:m:1:958431888:D15B77D202F776682DD8F535423DD8B6:r)

**As evidenced by these polls, people are taking notice** _**but we can't rest on our laurels**_. [Now more than ever, we need your support](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29322311:28121585233:m:1:958431888:D15B77D202F776682DD8F535423DD8B6:r) so we have the resources to keep pushing forward.

[Will you chip in right now to help?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29322311:28121585233:m:1:958431888:D15B77D202F776682DD8F535423DD8B6:r)

We'll also need your help with our grassroots programs, so please take a moment to sign up to volunteer: [JohnKasich.com/Volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29322312:28121585233:m:1:958431888:D15B77D202F776682DD8F535423DD8B6:r)

Thanks for all that you're doing. America needs John Kasich. With your help, we can win!

Sincerely,
**
John Weaver**
Chief Strategist

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Hillary Clinton did what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

"Hillary Clinton defends Planned Parenthood."

I could hardly believe my eyes when I read that headline yesterday morning.

If Hillary Clinton and her pro-abortion Democrat allies want to defend Planned Parenthood's killing of unborn babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit, they'll pay a massive price at the polls.

I'm bound and determined to make sure every member of Congress goes on record on my bill to stop your tax dollars from going to Planned Parenthood.

But Fellow Conservative, time is running out. The Senate convenes today at 2:00 PM EST.

Under Senate rules, if I can get enough Senators to stand with me and sign my petition demanding a vote, leadership will have no choice by to allow a vote on my bill.

I'm counting on you to help me gather the signatures needed to force a vote on my bill.

Here's what I'm asking you to do right away, Fellow Conservative:

1) Call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121**.

Tell them to "Stand with Rand" and sign my petition to force a vote on defunding Planned Parenthood. The Senate convenes at 2:00 PM EST today, so most offices should have staffers on hand to answer the phone;

2) **[Click here to add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322384:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r)**. When I lead the fight to defund Planned Parenthood, I need to know you're in my corner;

3) You and I need as much grassroots muscle as we can get on this one. So please forward this email to your friends, family members, coworkers and neighbors. Ask them to stand with you and me by adding their name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my petition;

4) **[Chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322384:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r)**. Your generosity will help me mobilize more Americans to this critical fight.

Fellow Conservative, it's time for every member of Congress who used pro-Life rhetoric to get votes on the campaign trail to keep their promises.

Not next week. Not next month. But NOW.

Congress has the power of the purse. So this is a fight you and I can win even with President Obama in the White House.

Studies show stopping funding for Planned Parenthood will result in more saved lives.

But time is running short. **[So please take immediate action](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322384:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r)**.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322384:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322385:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322386:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29322387:28122536491:m:1:879035888:B9047A289A3F781706AFA0434E58AAAC:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Plans next week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
What are your plans for watching the first
Republican presidential debate, hosted by FOX News in Cleveland,
next week?
You could be packing your bags and watching
the debate live and in person (with a friend!) -- here's how:
This is your last opportunity to enter our
debate contest and have a chance at winning roundtrip airfare for
two, two tickets, and accommodation for you & a friend to be at
the first Republican primary debate!
Tonight at midnight Eastern time, we close
the contest and tomorrow we'll pick the winner.
>> You can enter by making a donation of $5
or more right here. <<
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43122908:18306467000:m:3:1349778030:C152A397802CB145EEC21F2672CECDC1:r
Don't miss this once in a lifetime
opportunity.
Good luck!
Marco Rubio

Cleveland Debate Contest Rules

Contest ends July 26, 2015.
Limit one entry per individual
Make a contribution and also enter
You can also enter here without making a
contribution.

See full terms & conditions below. NO
PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR FINANCIAL CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS
NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS CONTEST. Making a contribution
does not increase your chances or odds of winning. To enter by
making a contribution, click here. Only individuals who are
legally permitted to make a federal contribution may enter by
making a contribution. To enter without making a contribution,
click here, and submit the alternate online entry form during the
contest period. Void where prohibited. Entrants agree to be
bound by these Rules and by the decisions of the Sponsor, which
are final and binding in all respects. To be eligible to win the
prize, entries must be completed and received by the Sponsor as
specified below. All applicable federal, state, and local laws
and regulations apply. The Promotion begins on July 16, 2015 at
12:00 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on July 26, 2015 at
11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must
be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Sunday, July 26,
2015. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: two (2)
tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in
Cleveland, OH on August 6, 2015; roundtrip airfare for the winner
and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest.
Sponsor, in its sole discretion, will choose the airline, hotel,
flight dates, and flight times, departure city and airport, and
any other prize logistics and details. Except as forth above,
the winner and his or her guests are responsible for ground
transportation to and from the airports and hotels, all meals,
and all other expenses that winner and his or her guest incur in
connection with the Prize. Odds of winning depend on the number
of entries received.

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Shut down the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The Senate went into a rare Sunday session a few hours ago.

Senator Paul is counting on you to call your Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and sign his petition to secure a vote on his hill to defund Planned Parenthood.

And if you haven't yet done so, please be sure to **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325516:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r)**. I've included a **[brief video](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325516:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r)** of Rand's interview this morning on Fox News.

On a Fox News interview this morning, Senator Paul discussed the discharge petition he filed. Under Senate rules, if enough Senators sign his petition, the Senate will have no choice but to hold a vote on his bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

As Senator Paul mentions in **[this video](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325516:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r)** , with Americans still reeling after the recent video showing Planned Parenthood abortionists discussing aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit, the time for the U.S. Senate to act is now!

With enough calls and petitions, the U.S. Senate will have no choice but to vote on this critical issue and you and I could strip all taxpayer funding from Planned Parenthood.

But time is short. Please call your Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and **[add your name (and watch the brief video clip)](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325516:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r)** as a Citizen Co-Sponsor IMMEDIATELY!

And if at all possible, **[please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325516:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r)** to help Senator Paul generate even more pressure on the Senate to vote on defunding Planned Parenthood.

Thank you in advance for your help and support.

\-- Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325516:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325517:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325518:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29325519:28124775425:m:1:879035888:DA9526381A0252345465F36A2875DE9F:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, The Senate went into a rare Sunday session a few hours ago. Senator Paul is counting on you to call your Senators at (202) 224-3121 and insist they "Stand with Rand" and sign his petition to secure a vote on his hill to defund Planned Parenthood. And if you haven't yet done so, please be sure to . I've included a of Rand's interview this morning on Fox News. On a Fox News interview this morning, Senator Paul discussed the discharge petition he filed. Under Senate rules, if enough Senators sign his petition, the Senate will have no choice but to hold a vote on his bill to defund Planned Parenthood. As Senator Paul mentions in , with Americans still reeling after the recent video showing Planned Parenthood abortionists discussing aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling their body parts for profit, the time for the U.S. Senate to act is now! With enough calls and petitions, the U.S. Senate will have no choice but to vote on this critical issue and you and I could strip all taxpayer funding from Planned Parenthood. But time is short. Please call your Senators at (202) 224-3121 and as a Citizen Co-Sponsor IMMEDIATELY! And if at all possible, to help Senator Paul generate even more pressure on the Senate to vote on defunding Planned Parenthood. Thank you in advance for your help and support. \-- Doug Stafford Chief Strategist Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-28124775425-echo3-C3DE6D974C2A442DEEB4A46C7E47AE6D@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: WATCH: My plan to combat climate change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We must combat climate change. | Friend --

Climate change is one of the most urgent problems facing our nation and our world. Tonight, I'm proud to announce the first steps of an ambitious plan to combat it and help make America a clean energy superpower.

**[If you're with me, watch this video to learn about the beginning of my plan, then add your name to say that we must take immediate action to fight climate change:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Too many Republicans in this race deny the very existence of this global threat by reminding you that they're not scientists. Well, I may not be a scientist, but I'm a grandmother with two eyes and a brain. That's all it takes to know that we must immediately address climate change, one of the defining challenges of our time. I hope you'll stand with me to do just that.

**Watch the video, then add your name to join me in the fight against climate change:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/climate-change/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Hillary

---

Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMxMzEyODgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyNjEzODYwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
